summary: Excellent sound and a ferocious Space>Jam>Other One, highlighted by a strong Shakedown opener.
review: Both reviewers give the recording high marks, praising its excellent audio quality and noting standout moments like a ferocious Space > Jam > Other One sequence and a great Shakedown to open the show. The performance is described as full of good stuff throughout, making it an enjoyable listen despite limited detail on individual members.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews highlight both superb recording quality and strong musical moments, warranting a rating in the high‑four range with moderate confidence due to limited review volume.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as excellent quality; no issues such as dropouts, muddiness, or imbalance are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening with a strong Shakedown sets an upbeat tone, and the second‑set ferocious Space > Jam > Other One provides a high‑energy highlight; overall pacing is praised as consistently good.
